query: v1.1 command surface realignment: task-first launch story, ds recent, and real architecture map
slice_title: Make task workflows the main launch story across tldr help README and docs
goal: Record progress for `v1.1 command surface realignment: task-first launch story, ds recent, and real architecture map`.
description: Refined the launch-story placement so brownfield workflows show ds task immediately after init when work is actionable, with map/recent/find/context positioned as optional trust checks around the task instead of a mandatory preflight.

git_diff.command: git diff --stat; git diff --name-only; git diff --cached --name-only; git ls-files --others --exclude-standard
git_diff.stat:
README.md                      | 23 ++++++++++++++++-------
 internal/commands/tldr.go      | 14 ++++++++------
 internal/commands/tldr_test.go |  9 +++++++--
 3 files changed, 31 insertions(+), 15 deletions(-)

learnings.summary: Brownfield recovery should teach init then task for actionable work; diagnostics are the optional trust layer around task creation, not the default pre-task funnel.
